change_summary: Bootstrap: scribe MCP v0.0.1 with three-tool data-layer API (init, read, update). Per-repo documentarian pattern.
Synthesized the real card for scribe v0.0.1 — replaces the scribe_init placeholder. Reflects ADR-001 (no LLM inside), GUARD-001/002/003, lighthouse north star ns_c5a90a5cc690, and the three-tool API.
Tick 9: scribe now knows its team. Added team.yaml (12 members) + read_team loader + scribe_team MCP tool. Card updated to list known teammates in frontmatter.

Tick 10: scribe/.hone/hone.yaml written, mirroring visionlog GUARD-001/002/003 plus vision into hone per-target contract format. Future hone ticks on scribe now surface guardrails as hard constraints. Log-only update (card unchanged this tick, per scribe-is-small principle).

scribe repo committed to git for the first time. Commit ce2fc5b on main: 28 files. Trajectory + visionlog state + lighthouse state + team roster all durable. No code changes to scribe itself this tick; log-only update.
